company.name: Your Startup Advisor
company.description: Expert mentorship and advisory services for startup founders, with a focus on avoiding common mistakes and providing strategic guidance across all startup phases.

intent_signals: "Sharp insight, pure generosity, great guidance. Every founder should work with Charles."
"Charles helped transform a concept into a funded startup while improving pitch, go-to-market strategy, and the program itself."
"Charles taught me to think like an entrepreneur, not just act like one."
